open_ended.Q7_most_significant_benefit: Provides engaging, relevant material while relieving the ML of the effort of constructing it
open_ended.Q8_most_significant_drawback: It needs a few small refinements to be truly effective: the initial exercise should be a video example. And the descriptive prompt should stay on screen as you work through each  regular-expression exercises. I also note that the regular expression matches more in the sample code than it means to: the pre dot and post dot part of a float (for integers), keywords for identifiers etc. That is quite confusing.
